CustomField.description: Specifies how the Rent Invoice due date is determined—either on a fixed calendar day or relative to the Invoice Date, Rent Start Date, or Rent End Date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: "Fixed Date": Enter a specific day(1-31) in the 'Rent Due Day' field. "Fixed Day in a Week": Select both a 'Day' and a 'Weekday Number' to specify, for e.g., the 2nd Tuesday of the month. "Relative": Enter a number of days in the 'Rent Due Day' field to set the due date relative to the Invoice Date, Rent Start/End Date.
CustomField.label: Rent Due Type

value.fullName: Relative Based On Rent Period Start Date
value.label: Relative Based On Rent Period Start Date

value.fullName: Relative Based On Rent Period End Date
value.label: Relative Based On Rent Period End Date
